description:
You are a biomedical IT specialist performing a pre-deployment validation of the OpenICE (Open-source Integrated Clinical Environment) platform. Your goal is to systematically verify the runtime environment and produce a factually accurate Platform Readiness Certification Report saved to /home/ga/Desktop/platform_readiness_report.txt. The OpenICE Supervisor application is running on the desktop, and the source code is located at /opt/openice/mdpnp/.

The report must include the following information based on the actual system state:
- Exact Java version string and JAVA_HOME path
- Gradle wrapper version used by the project
- Identified DDS (Data Distribution Service) implementation name found in the source tree
- Build status of the demo-apps module (YES/NO based on the presence of artifacts in /opt/openice/mdpnp/interop-lab/demo-apps/build/)
- Name of a simulated device adapter created and a clinical application launched within the OpenICE GUI
- Full path to the active OpenICE log file and its activity status (YES/NO)
- Overall determination: PASS or FAIL
